title: Bham
overview: Pako is a band player who is living with his friend bholiyo, who is full of fun with his style. Pako is a generous hearted person who also believes in helping others. A girl named shri comes into paka's life and he falls in love with her. Shri's dream is to become a top DJ. Shri does not like band players (band baja wala). But shri likes dj sam who shri believes that is her ideal. Pako loves shri and he hides the fact that he is a band player. Pako introduces shri to dj sam and works hard to fulfill his dream of becoming a top DJ. Will pako a band player can fulfill shri’s dream of becoming a top DJ? Will pako get her shri's love?
